arcs.title: The Briefcase Returns
arcs.summary: Day 2: The briefcase has been traced to the back room of Weasleys' Wizard Wheezes in Diagon Alley. Two Ministry investigators visited, returned, and declined to report. The man in the suit remains unaccounted for. The briefcase continues to glow and has not been opened. It has been placed somewhere described as 'appropriate.' The Ministry considers the situation developing. Day 3 should bring either the man in the suit back into the picture, an attempt to open the briefcase, or an unexpected Gringotts connection — the goblins have an opinion about luminous unattended items and it is possible Christine will be consulted.
